description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and defines an IMAGE variable as $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_REF_SLUG. Define a single stage called build. Add a build job named build in the build stage that runs: docker build -t ${IMAGE} ., docker login -p ${CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD} -u ${CI_REGISTRY_USER} ${CI_REGISTRY}, and docker push ${IMAGE}. The job runs on every pipeline execution.
